nasb.text: For the sake of Your word, and according to Your own heart, You have done all this greatness to let Your servant know.

esv.text: Because of your promise, and according to your own heart, you have brought about all this greatness, to make your servant know it.

cnv.text: 你因自己應許的緣故，又按照自己的心意，行了這大事，為要使你僕人明白。

ccb.text: 你让仆人知道你凭自己的应许、按自己的旨意行了这大事。
